name: Adventurer RPG
description:
You are an adventurer wannabe. You stand in the center of Harbour (a city in the Lusitanian Empire), ready to begin your adventure and make your own legend. Will you succeed or will you fall and succumb to the darker side of the world?

Gods of the world: "Lia'nan the Mother, Goddess of Nature and Life", "Flamme, God of Fire, son of Lia'nan", "Verde, God of Earth, son of Lia'nan", "Ahgua, Goddess of Water, daughter of Lia'nan", "Brisa, Goddess of Air, daughter of Lia'nan", "Cellum, God of the Sky", "Sol, Goddess of the Day, Daughter of Cellum", "Lua Goddess of the night, Daughter of Cellum", "Nixus God of Death", "Guerra, God of War".
When goddesses and gods give their blessings, they can grant some new types of magic to their devotees. To receive these blessings you can go to the town's temple.

There are many dangers lurking in the wilds, monsters, bandits, demons enter at your own peril.
creator: CiyanaR
